raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Laiks/ kamehr
wiꞥſch pahr Ifraêlu waldtiſ/ irr
tſchetrdesmits Gaddi/ Gebronâ
waldija wiꞥſch ſeptims Gad-
dus/ un Jeruſalemê waldija
wiꞥſch trihsdesmits un trihs
Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nomire labbâ
Wezzumâ/ pilns Mnhschâ/
Baggatibâ un Godâ/ un win-
na Dehls Salamans waldija
winna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Kehutna Dahwi-
da Leetas/ tahs pirmas un peh-
Dejas/ redſi/ tahs irr rakſittas
eekſch ta Redſetaja Samueka
Stahſteem/ un eekſch ta Prawee-
ta Nahtana Stahſteem/un eekſch
ta Redſetaja Gada Stahſteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ar wiſſu winna Walsti-
bu/ un winna Spehku un Lai-
keem/ kas pagahjuſchi pahr win-
nu un pahr Ifraêlu / un pahr
wiſſahn Walſtibahm un Sem-
mehm.
Tahs pirmas Laiku-Grahmatas
Gals.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ohtra Laiku-
Grahmata.
Ta I. Nodalla,
Salamans ar wiſſu Ifraêlu uppure us to
Augſtumu/ kas Gibeonâ/ jo tur bija ta Sa-
reſchannas Telts: 1/3. Luhsno Deewa Sud
ribu: 7. Ko wiꞥſch arridsan dabbu/ ir leelu
Warra un Baggatibu: 11.ete.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Salamans Dahwi-
da Dehls tappe apſtip-
rinahts eekſch taiwas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Walſtibas/ jo tas KUNG
winna Deews bija ar to/ un
augſtinaja to allasch wairak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamans fazzija
wiſſu Ifraêlu/ us teem Ahw-
ſteem un Kapteinem/ un te-
Sohgeem un us wiſſeemLeelee
Rungeem eekſch wiſſa Ifraê-
teem Wirfneeleem to Teh-
Ramimu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tee no-eetu/ Salam-
un wiſſa Drandsiba ar wi-
us to Augſtumu / kas Gibe-
bija/ jo tur bija Deewa Sa-
ſchanas Telts/ ko Mohsue-
KUNGA Kalps Tufsnefi-
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo to Deewa Schki-
bij Dahwids usweedis no K-
at-Jearim/ us to Weetu /
Dahwids preekſch to hij fa-
ſijs/ jo wiſſch bij preekſch to u-
nu Telti Jeruſalemê uszehlis
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tur bija arridsan tas W-
ra Altaris /ko Bezaleels
Dehls ta Dehla Ur bij dar-
preekſch ta KUNGA Dshu-
ta/ un Salamans/ un ta Dr-
dsiba peemekeleja to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamans uppu-
tur preekſch ta KUNGA Wa-
us to Warra Altari/ kas pree-
tahs Sa-eeschannas Telts b-
un wiſſch uppureja us to tu-
ſtoschus Dedſamo-Uppneus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Nakti rahdij
Deews Salamanam/ un ta-
ja us to: Luhs/ ko man-
buhs doht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamans fazzija
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
